Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Caius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Caius stands at the edge of a ring of firelight with Olissa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Caius is a person who carries large crates in the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Caius is a person in the wagon with a great dark stain on his right side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Caius was carried into Valinhall by Olissa and Lycus.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Caius is Lycus and Andra's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Caius is a Damascan trader.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Caius is the husband of Olissa Agnos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Caius was holding onto a table to catch his breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Caius was present in Simon's bedroom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
